name: Easy Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Reduced Fat Smooth Peanut Butter
1/4 cup Egg Beaters® (99% Egg Substitute) or 1 Egg
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a bowl, combine the flour, cornstarch, baking powder, and baking soda. Stir well and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the brown sugar, vegetable oil, granulated sugar, peanut butter, corn syrup, vanilla extract, and egg (or egg substitute). Beat until well blended.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the wet ingredients and stir until just combined.
5. Lightly coat your hands with cooking spray. Form the dough into 48 balls (about 1 inch in diameter).
6. Roll each ball in granulated sugar, then place them about 2 inches apart on baking sheets coated with cooking spray.
7. Using the bottom of a glass, gently flatten the cookies.
8. Bake for 7 minutes at 375°F or until lightly browned. Remove from pans and let cool on wire racks.
Yield: 4 dozen (serving size 1 cookie)
